languages.text: "То же, что и со мной. Его подключили к опытному образцу, чтобы заставить говорить. Он стоически вынес это истязание, не проронив ни слова". {n}Манипулус прикрывает глаза истончившимися, почти прозрачными веками.{/n} "Тервантьяс хотел, чтобы я видел... весь процесс от начала и до конца".

"He suffered the same fate I did. He was connected to an experimental specimen to force him to speak. He endured this torment stoically, without uttering a word." {n}The Manipulus closes his eyes with parchment-thin lids.{/n} "Tervantias made me watch... the entire process."
languages.original_text: "То же, что и со мной. Его подключили к опытному образцу, чтобы заставить говорить. Он стоически вынес это истязание, не проронив ни слова". {n}Манипулус прикрывает глаза истончившимися, почти прозрачными веками.{/n} "Тервантьяс хотел, чтобы я видел... весь процесс от начала и до конца".

traits.locale_text: "He suffered the same fate I did. He was connected to an experimental specimen to make him speak. He endured this torment stoically, without uttering a word." {n}The Manipulus closes his eyes with parchment-thin lids.{/n} "Tervantias made me watch... the entire process."

"He suffered the same fate I did. He was connected to an experimental specimen to make him speak. He endured this torment stoically, without uttering a word." {n}The Manipulus closes his eyes with parchment-thin lids.{/n} "Tervantias made me watch... the entire process."

"He suffered the same fate I did. He was connected to an experimental specimen to force him to speak. He endured this torment stoically, without uttering a word." {n}The Manipulus closes his eyes with parchment-thin lids.{/n} "Tervantias made me watch... the entire process."

"He suffered the same fate I did. He was connected to an experimental specimen to force him to speak. He endured this torment stoically, without uttering a word." {n}The Manipulus closes his eyes with parchment-thin lids.{/n} "Tervantias made me watch... the entire process."

"He suffered the same fate I did. He was connected to an experimental specimen to force him to speak. He endured this torment stoically, without uttering a word." {n}The Manipulus closes his eyes with parchment-thin lids.{/n} "Tervantias made me watch... the entire process."

languages.text: "Er hat dasselbe Schicksal erlitten wie ich. Er war mit einem experimentellen Versuchsstück verbunden, um ihn zum Reden zu zwingen. Er hat seine Folter stoisch ertragen, ohne auch nur ein Wort zu sagen." {n}Der Manipulus schließt seine Augen mit den pergamentartigen Lidern.{/n} "Tervantias ließ mich ... den gesamten Prozess mitansehen."
languages.original_text: "He suffered the same fate I did. He was connected to an experimental specimen to force him to speak. He endured this torment stoically, without uttering a word." {n}The Manipulus closes his eyes with parchment-thin lids.{/n} "Tervantias made me watch... the entire process."

traits.locale_text: "Er hat dasselbe Schicksal erlitten wie ich. Er war mit einem experimentellen Versuchsstück verbunden, um ihn zum Reden zu zwingen. Er hat seine Folter stoisch ertragen, ohne auch nur ein Wort zu sagen." {n}Der Manipulus schließt seine Augen mit den pergamentartigen Lidern.{/n} "Tervantias ließ mich ... den gesamten Prozess mitansehen."

languages.text: « Il a subi le même destin que moi. Il a été connecté à un spécimen expérimental afin de le forcer à parler. Il a enduré ces tourments de manière stoïque, sans prononcer un mot. » {n}Le manipulus ferme les yeux, ses paupières sont si fines que vous craignez qu'elles se déchirent sous l'effort.{/n} « Tervantias m'a forcé à observer... l'intégralité de la manipulation. »
languages.original_text: "He suffered the same fate I did. He was connected to an experimental specimen to force him to speak. He endured this torment stoically, without uttering a word." {n}The Manipulus closes his eyes with parchment-thin lids.{/n} "Tervantias made me watch... the entire process."

traits.locale_text: « Il a subi le même destin que moi. Il a été connecté à un spécimen expérimental afin de le forcer à parler. Il a enduré ces tourments de manière stoïque, sans prononcer un mot. » {n}Le manipulus ferme les yeux, ses paupières sont si fines que vous craignez qu'elles se déchirent sous l'effort.{/n} « Tervantias m'a forcé à observer... l'intégralité de la manipulation. »

languages.text: «Ha sufrido el mismo destino que yo. Lo conectó a un espécimen experimental para obligarlo a hablar. Soportó estoicamente la tortura sin decir palabra». {n}El manipulus cierra sus finos párpados.{/n} «Tervantias me obligó a presenciar... todo el proceso».
languages.original_text: "He suffered the same fate I did. He was connected to an experimental specimen to force him to speak. He endured this torment stoically, without uttering a word." {n}The Manipulus closes his eyes with parchment-thin lids.{/n} "Tervantias made me watch... the entire process."

traits.locale_text: «Ha sufrido el mismo destino que yo. Lo conectó a un espécimen experimental para obligarlo a hablar. Soportó estoicamente la tortura sin decir palabra». {n}El manipulus cierra sus finos párpados.{/n} «Tervantias me obligó a presenciar... todo el proceso».

languages.text: "O da benimle aynı kaderi paylaştı. Konuşmaya zorlamak için deneysel bir numuneye bağlandı. Bu işkenceye tek bir kelime bile etmeden metanetle katlandı." {n}Manipülus, parşömen kadar ince göz kapaklarıyla gözlerini kapatıyor.{/n} "Tervantias... Bana tüm süreci izletti."
languages.original_text: "He suffered the same fate I did. He was connected to an experimental specimen to force him to speak. He endured this torment stoically, without uttering a word." {n}The Manipulus closes his eyes with parchment-thin lids.{/n} "Tervantias made me watch... the entire process."

traits.locale_text: "O da benimle aynı kaderi paylaştı. Konuşmaya zorlamak için deneysel bir numuneye bağlandı. Bu işkenceye tek bir kelime bile etmeden metanetle katlandı." {n}Manipülus, parşömen kadar ince göz kapaklarıyla gözlerini kapatıyor.{/n} "Tervantias... Bana tüm süreci izletti."

languages.text: “他也遭遇了与我相同的命运，被连接到一具实验标本上，以此逼迫他开口。他默默承受了一切折磨，一个字也没说。”{n}操纵者合上纸一样薄的眼睑。{/n}“特万提亚斯强迫我……从头看到尾。”
languages.original_text: "He suffered the same fate I did. He was connected to an experimental specimen to force him to speak. He endured this torment stoically, without uttering a word." {n}The Manipulus closes his eyes with parchment-thin lids.{/n} "Tervantias made me watch... the entire process."

traits.locale_text: “他也遭遇了与我相同的命运，被连接到一具实验标本上，以此逼迫他开口。他默默承受了一切折磨，一个字也没说。”{n}操纵者合上纸一样薄的眼睑。{/n}“特万提亚斯强迫我……从头看到尾。”

languages.text: 「彼は私と同じ運命をたどりました。彼は、口を割らせるために、実験用の標本へとつながれたのです。彼はこの責め苦を、一言も発することなく、毅然と耐え抜きました」{n}マニピュルスは、羊皮紙のように薄い瞼を閉じる。{/n}「テルヴァンティアスは私に……その一部始終を見せつけたのです」
languages.original_text: "He suffered the same fate I did. He was connected to an experimental specimen to force him to speak. He endured this torment stoically, without uttering a word." {n}The Manipulus closes his eyes with parchment-thin lids.{/n} "Tervantias made me watch... the entire process."

traits.locale_text: 「彼は私と同じ運命をたどりました。彼は、口を割らせるために、実験用の標本へとつながれたのです。彼はこの責め苦を、一言も発することなく、毅然と耐え抜きました」{n}マニピュルスは、羊皮紙のように薄い瞼を閉じる。{/n}「テルヴァンティアスは私に……その一部始終を見せつけたのです」
